FMA Communication 2024/1 - List of the most representative services linked to a payment account
FMA Communication 2024/1 - List of the most representative services linked to a payment account
01.02.24
•
Supervision and Regulation
With FMA Notice 2024/1, the FMA issues a list of the most representative services associated with a payment account within the meaning of Article 3(1)(28) of the Payment Accounts Act of September 30, 2021 (ZKG). This list includes both a description of national services and an EEA-wide standardized description of certain services defined by the European Commission Delegated Regulation (EU) 2018/32.
FMA-Mitteilung 2024/1 – Liste der repräsentativsten mit einem Zahlungskonto verbundenen Dienste
